reviews.review_description: I like buying games/app that don't require me to have to be online 24/7... This app says internet connection not required, but you actually need to be connected to your WIFI to see your WIFI signal strength in mixed reality 🙃 I like the app though, but im not sure if it's that's accurate because my wifi drops when I'm in my kitchen, but this app says my wifi is good in my kitchen. 🤷‍♂️
